programme.title: The Adventures of Peter and Wolf
programme.desc: A sitcom about the adventures of ordinary schoolboy Peter and talking Wolf connecting the world of people to parallel universes, where there live robots and vampires, werewolves and zombies, giants and aliens, fairies and centaurs, clones and invisible men! The characters will have to solve locals' problems and regularly save the world.

programme.title: The Fixies
programme.desc: The Fixies follows the comical misadventures of Tom Thomas and his secret friendship with Simka and Nolik, the children of the Fixie family that lives in his apartment. There's just no end to the troubles Tom Thomas and his Fixie friends get themselves into with all the gadgets and appliances around them!

programme.title: Eliot Kid
programme.desc: When a tooth falling out turns into a hunt for the “giant mouse”, when the city's sewers transform into Indiana Jones' white rapids or when a trip to the toilets becomes an expedition to a haunted house, well then you've entered the wonderful world of Eliot Kid!

programme.title: Angry Birds Toons
programme.desc: Check out Angry Birds Toons compilations! Each compilation has several episodes from your favorite shows including Angry Birds, Piggy Tales, and Stella!

programme.title: Chefclub Kids
programme.desc: With Chefclub Kids, the little ones get their hands dirty all while having fun in the kitchen. Whether they're learning to prepare dinner, bake goodies, or explore new flavors, Chefclub Kids is a way for children to gain confidence through cooking!

programme.title: GWR Incredible Record Breakers
programme.desc: Guinness World Records presents Incredible Record Breakers from all over.

programme.title: Talking Tom and Friends
programme.desc: Things get even more epic in Season 3 as Talking Tom and Friends try new ways to make their dreams come true, making more friends (and enemies) along the way!

programme.title: Everybody Loves a Moose
programme.desc: An oddball buddy series between an over ambitious boy, Jack and his pal Moose, a melodramatic self-confessed expert in everything. Except he isn't! Despite his best intentions, he always messes up and although Jack may not get what he want, you can't help being sucked in by Moose's relentless optimism and zest for life!

programme.title: Princess Play Time
programme.desc: The proud Princess likes to do things her own way, but her antics are always joined by her restless brother, Prince, who tends to turn everything topsy-turvy. Any playtime in their room transforms into a fantastic journey through unusual worlds: the children arrange a picnic on the Moon, conduct a detective investigation in a toy city, or search for pirate treasures on islands! Although initially, the Princess and Prince seem to clash and compete, by the end, they always find joy in each other's company and that of their cherished dog, Bona.

programme.title: Om Nom Stories
programme.desc: Sweet tooth Om Nom is wandering Around the world, eats a lot of candies and tries to find his Dream job. Watch his adventures and solve different puzzles on the way!

programme.title: Box Yourself
programme.desc: Great Projects From Ordinary Cardboard!

programme.title: Ollie! The Boy Who Became What He Ate
programme.desc: Ollie is a 6-year-old with a massive imagination, often lost in his own world - flipping, sliding, climbing and rocket-blasting through the house, practicing at being the master of all things. But even masters need to stop and refuel. When meals or snack time interrupt Ollie's play, he finds himself confronted with the real challenge of childhood trying new food. To escape his predicament, Ollie uses his magic spoon to transport himself, along with his sister Poppy, and her stuffy Nummy, to a food planet filled with adventure and the very food Ollie stuck his spoon into.

programme.title: Beyblade G Revolution E16
programme.desc: As Max prepares to face Kai in the next round, the members of BBA Revolution overhear a confrontation between Johnny and Robert of the Majestics and Barthez Battalion.

programme.title: Beyblade G Revolution E17
programme.desc: The BBA Revolution are slated to face the sneaky Barthez Battalion, but while Hilary and Kenny want to report their dirty deeds to the authorities, Tyson believes the best way to teach them a lesson is to beat them fair and square...But that's before he really sees how low the team will sink to win.

programme.title: Beyblade G Revolution E18
programme.desc: Our heroes land in Egypt for the next leg of the tournament where the first two teams going up against each other are the Blitzkrieg Boys against the Barthez Battalion. But as Barthez readies his team, we learn he's devised a special spider web-like tape that is supposed to shoot out of his team's blades and trap their opponents in an inescapable web.

programme.title: Beyblade G Revolution E19
programme.desc: Max is having trouble convincing Rick that he is truly dedicated to the PPB All Starz. Max just wants to play for love of the game but Rick thinks he should do anything to win. When the competition continues Max demands they fight a "pairs" match so that he and Rick are forced to work as a team.

programme.title: Beyblade G Revolution E1
programme.desc: Tyson has just returned back from the World Championships with another victory and he's decided to teach a class of boys in the neighborhood the fine art of blading.

programme.title: Beyblade G Revolution E2
programme.desc: Tyson has his hands full when he's confronted by a tough little Blader named Daichi. Just as they're about to battle another mysterious Blader named Jin shows up and wants to challenge Tyson as well. All three Bladers mix it up but Ray puts a stop to the fight when he realizes that Tyson can't handle two Bladers at once.

programme.title: Beyblade G Revolution E3
programme.desc: Daichi continues to annoy Tyson with his constant battle challenges, which Tyson refuses to give in to - even after an embarrassing confrontation at the public swimming pool proves that Daichi is an impressive and highly skilled Beyblader.

programme.title: Beyblade G Revolution E4
programme.desc: Tyson's alone and picking up the pieces of what used to be The Bladebreakers... Daichi won't leave him alone, and Kai is...well, Kai...at least he's got the championships to look forward too, right? Meanwhile, both Ray and Max are going through the growing pains of being part of a new team.

programme.title: Beyblade G Revolution E5
programme.desc: At the preliminaries for the World Championships, Daichi wins his matches easily, establishing himself as a new powerhouse on the Beyblading scene. Kenny also competes, defeating his opponents with such skill that even Tyson is impressed.

programme.title: Beyblade G Revolution E6
programme.desc: There's only one round left in the tournament to decide who's going to partner up with Tyson in the World Beyblade Tag Team Championships and it's between Daichi and Kai.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh Duel Monsters 220: Legendary Fisherman Part 2
programme.desc: Mako's oceanic warrior, The Legendary Fisherman, unleashes a wave of destruction by stealthily destroying Joey's monsters from the depths of the sea. Joey has to put his skills, training and experience to the ultimate test before he's all washed out.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh Duel Monsters 221: Double Duel Part 1
programme.sub-title: Yugi and Kabia vs. Lumis and Umbra
programme.desc: Marik, with the help of Bakura, kidnaps Joey and Tea. The Rare Hunters also kidnap Mokuba to force Yugi and Kaiba to take on tag team duelists Umbra and Lumis on top of a skyscraper. The losers will be sent plummeting into the Shadow Realm.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh Duel Monsters 222: Double Duel Part 2
programme.sub-title: Yugi and Kabia vs. Lumis and Umbra
programme.desc: Lumis and Umbra systematically dismantle Yugi and Kaiba's tumultuous teamwork. Can Yugi and Kaiba learn to put their differences aside before they're sent on a one-way trip into the Shadow Realm?

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh Duel Monsters 223: Double Duel Part 3
programme.sub-title: Yugi and Kabia vs. Lumis and Umbra
programme.desc: Yugi and Kaiba start to exhibit signs of teamwork, but it's too little too late when Umbra and Lumis summon Masked Beast Des Gardius.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh Duel Monsters 224: Double Duel Part 4
programme.sub-title: Yugi and Kabia vs. Lumis and Umbra
programme.desc: Yugi combines his magnetic monsters into the polar powerhouse Valkyrion the Magna Warrior!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh Duel Monsters 225: The Rescue
programme.desc: Yugi and Kaiba are on a rescue mission to save their friends. But along the way, all their worries and secrets are revealed as they relive the troubles they've faced and will face in the future.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh Duel Monsters 226: Friends 'til the End Part 1
programme.desc: It's friend versus friend as Marik mind controls Joey to duel against Yugi. The loser will be dragged into the ocean to sleep with the fishes!

programme.title: Rekkit Rabbit: Rekkit Rabbit
programme.desc: Jay's favourite volleyball player is playing at the local stadium, and Jay really wants to go but he isn't allowed out at night In order to make the daytime last longer, Rekkit steals the moon from the sky.

programme.title: Rekkit Rabbit: Rekkit Rabbit
programme.desc: To keep Lorne happy, Jay agrees to take part in the Little Mister Potato Guy contest, even though he is mortified and embarrassed.

programme.title: Rekkit Rabbit: Rekkit Rabbit
programme.desc: Jay's favourite volleyball player is playing at the local stadium, and Jay really wants to go but he isn't allowed out at night In order to make the daytime last longer, Rekkit steals the moon from the sky.

programme.title: Dennis and Gnasher
programme.desc: Dennis makes a line of practical jokes for Mr. Scrimp, called 'The Menace Collection.' However, Dennis soon learns that it will put Mr. Har Har out of business.

programme.title: Dennis and Gnasher
programme.desc: After Walter takes up origami as a martial art, Dennis scoffs and comes up with his own martial art, and so the two prepare to battle it out. Followed by 'Smelling of Roses'

programme.title: Dennis and Gnasher
programme.desc: After watching a film about an alien invasion, Dennis, Curly and Pie Face decide to make their own film. However, Walter stumbles across them filming, and he only sees the action, not the camera. Filming what he sees on his mobile phone, he runs to tell the whole of Beanotown about the alien invasion. As panic spreads, Dennis and his friends discover the chaos and decide to keep filming in order to help make the best of their own alien film. Meanwhile, Sergeant Slipper investigates the alien landing that Walter has seen, and discovers the truth—that the spaceship is a playhouse with glow sticks in it. Followed by 'Castle in the Air'

programme.title: Dennis and Gnasher
programme.desc: Dennis and his pet dog, Gnasher, live by just one rule: Kids should make all the rules! Followed by Dance of the Seven Pies.

programme.title: Dennis and Gnasher
programme.desc: To get his friends back from Walter's group, Dennis challenges Walter to a videogames battle. Followed by 'Fish Tale'.

programme.title: Dennis and Gnasher
programme.desc: For a school project, Dennis and Walter both build robots. However, during an accident, both robots merge, causing Dennis and Walter to defend the school. Followed by 'No Joke.'

programme.title: Dennis and Gnasher
programme.desc: With one backstage pass for a Ratbucket gig, Dennis and his friends pass themselves off as Ratbucket, only for the real Ratbucket not to be able to play at his own concert. Followed by 60 second Dennis and 'Bad Dad'

programme.title: Dennis and Gnasher
programme.desc: After Dennis breaks his bike, Dad is unable to afford a new one, so Dennis convinces him to ask his boss for a raise. Unfortunately, Mr Scrimp reduces his wages instead. Dennis then trashes his house to convince Scrimp that his family are poor, so that Mr Scrimp will feel compelled to raise Dad's wages. Just as Scrimp has been taken in by Dennis' plan, Mum and Dad arrive home laden with shopping bags, resulting in Dad getting fired on the spot. Dennis resolves to get Dad his old job back by secretly causing chaos at his office. To restore order Scrimp rehires Dad, sealing the deal with a generous pay rise. Mum and Dad repair the house, but still don't have enough money to buy Dennis a new bike, instead it gets repaired with Dad's office rubber bands and paperclips. Followed by 60 Second Dennis and 'Dennis Hiccups'.

programme.title: Dennis and Gnasher
programme.desc: Believing Gnasher and Gnipper to be trapped in Beanotown Dog Pound, Dennis comes up with a plan to rescue his friends and bring them both home. Followed by more Dennis and Gnasher episodes.

programme.title: Dennis and Gnasher
programme.desc: When Dennis breaks his skateboard again, Dad agrees to buy Dennis the best skateboard there is as a replacement if he is able to win a prize at the upcoming school award ceremony. Followed by 60 Second Dennis and 'Dance of the Seven Pies'

programme.title: Dennis and Gnasher
programme.desc: Mum has bought curtain material for the soon to be newly decorated kitchen, and asks Dad to look after it while she is out. However, Dad falls asleep and mistakenly agrees that Dennis can use it as a giant sail. When Dad realises that it has gone, he calls Dennis to bring it back, but unfortunately Dennis gets into a spot of bother with the colonel, who takes the curtain material off Dennis. In an attempt to steal it back, the garden being wrecked and the kitchen is left looking like a bombsite. Dennis, Gnasher and Dad have to clean up the whole kitchen and redecorate it in time for Mum returning. When Mum decides it is time to hang the new curtains, Dennis is about to get the curtain material, but Mum reveals that she has changed her mind and bought new curtains instead. Followed by 'Fangs for the Memories'

programme.title: Dennis and Gnasher
programme.desc: Dennis, his friends and Walter's friends get marooned on a desert island when Dennis attempts to escape a boring field trip. Followed by Substitute Creecher

programme.title: Dennis and Gnasher
programme.desc: Dennis plays a prank on the citizens of Beanotown, causing them to evacuate, which causes trouble for Dennis later. Followed by 'No Place Like Home'

programme.title: Dennis and Gnasher
programme.desc: Gnasher and Gnipper enter a dog show, regardless of Walter saying they don't have true talent. He wants Athena and Miss Mini Wuff to win, but Walter has just underestimated Gnasher's true capabilities. Followed by Grounded.

programme.title: Dennis and Gnasher
programme.desc: Athena gets Gnasher envy when seeing a pampered version of Gnasher in a magazine and when she hears that Dennis owns an Abyssinian wire-haired tripe hound (Gnasher), she wants him. However, being an owner to Gnasher isn't all cracked up to be! Followed by 'Splash'

programme.title: Dennis and Gnasher
programme.desc: Dennis gets a case of the hiccups from Mr. Har Har's can-o-giggles and is looking for a way to cure them ready for a film premier. Followed by Athena's Party

programme.title: Dennis and Gnasher
programme.desc: The garden is accidentaly wrecked when Dennis tries to give Gnasher a bath, so the gang have to fix the mess before Mum comes home. Followed by 'Run Rabbit Run'

programme.title: Polly Pocket
programme.desc: When Polly inherits a magic locket that allows her to shrink to four inches tall, she embraces her pocket-sized powers and finds the upside of shrinking is big fun!

programme.title: Pingu
programme.desc: Pingu is a cheeky, charming penguin who finds himself in comical situations in his snowy world!

programme.title: Operation Ouch
programme.desc: In this episode, Dr Chris swallows a super cool camera pill to follow the journey that food makes through his body. Dr Xand explains how strong our bones are and meets someone who has developed the technology to grow bones in a laboratory. Plus, Dr Chris is put to the test as he takes part in a super realistic mock surgery scenario. Meanwhile over in accident and emergency, one patient's race to the finishing line means a trip to surgery to fix a broken elbow and another is admitted with a sore eye and blurred vision.

programme.title: Pingu
programme.desc: Pingu is a cheeky, charming penguin who finds himself in comical situations in his snowy world!

programme.title: Operation Ouch
programme.desc: Packed with incredible facts about the human body, Dr Chris and Dr Xand van Tulleken experiment and explore their way through the fascinating world of medicine and biology.

programme.title: Dennis & Gnasher
programme.desc: Cat-astrophic comedy capers with the wise-cracking, nap-taking and lasagne-loving cat Garfield.

programme.title: Science Max
programme.desc: Have you ever done a science experiment and wondered “What would this be like if it were HUGE?” - Welcome to Science Max, the exciting series that turbocharges science experiments.

programme.title: Tales of Tatonka: The Great Berry Race / Earthquake
programme.desc: The wolf-cubs have organized a race to find the juicy berries Poum has mentioned. The winner who arrives first gets the most berries. Poum has to decide whether to continue to cheat or help a friend in need. / An earthquake has destroyed Tap-Tap's dam and the young beaver is at risk of being easy prey. The wolf-cubs help her to rebuild her habitat.

programme.title: Krewcraft: Who sent this letter!?
programme.desc: Who sent us this letter!?

programme.title: Misha the Purple Cat: The Basketball Game / Once Upon a Time
programme.desc: Misha's school has a basketball game scheduled against another school. The kids from there are tall, strong and word has it, are very good players. Misha's team is nervous but they know that no one can compete with Gina Giraffe. Gina, however, breaks a leg and can't play, so they have to find a substitute. / Misha is not feeling well. She has a high fever and a little problem: she doesn't want to take the medicine, because it tastes really bad. Her grandfather brings her a book to read while she rests in bed. As she reads the book, she enters into the story. Suddenly she finds herself in a faraway place and doesn't know how to get home.

programme.title: Overtime: Dude Perfect vs. Luka Doncic (1-on-1)
programme.desc: Cody vs Luka in 1-on-1, Trick Shots with Luka, and he joins us for Cool Not Cool!

programme.title: Dinocore: Showdown! Rex vs. Darkno
programme.desc: Darkno tries to make the volcano erupt. Dino Island is in danger, and Rex heads toward the volcano to protect the island but encounters a swarm of Mecha Dinos in his way.

programme.title: The Dodo
programme.desc: This lost snake is covered in ticks and dehydrated! Her rescuers bring her home and get her right into the bath to help get the ticks off. But when she's had a drink and all of the ticks are gone, her skin still has cuts... what are they going to do? / Ronan's a tiny bat who just wants to fly like his older friends. But he's still just a baby! He's great at hanging upside down, but before he can try flying, he'll have to get much bigger. He'll have to practice flapping his wings, eating on his own so he can get really strong, and pickup up tips from the other bats in the colony! / Tiny Tim's a baby bunny who was born way smaller than his bigger brothers and sisters. He wants to hang out and play with them but needs to get so much bigger before he can. Let's watch him grow up!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! VRAINS: Link into the VRAINS
programme.desc: When a nefarious group of hackers threatens to destroy the cyber world, one duelist is determined to stop them – Playmaker!

programme.title: Akedo: Ultimate Arcade Warriors: THE FINAL FIGHT AKEDO: Ultimate Arcade Warriors / Bro Battles, Bro Problems | AKEDO: Ultimate Arcade Warriors
programme.desc: It's the FINAL ROUND and Jet is up against Ward! Each player is allowed to have one Giant and one regular warrior each. But will Ward play by the rules? programme.title: Origanimals
programme.desc: Help a Flightless Cormorant Realize his Dream of Flying. Where there's a will, there's a way.

programme.title: Origanimals
programme.desc: Help a black caiman to make friends with other animals who are frightened of him. One shouldn't judge based on appearances alone.

programme.title: Wild Kratts: Elephant in the Room
programme.desc: The brothers come across a lone baby elephant and bring him back to the Tortuga HQ for safety until they can find his mom. But they learn how mischievous baby elephants can be and get more than they bargained for when it almost destroys the Tortuga! As they rush to get the baby elephant home, the WildKratts team realizes that animals have different structures that serve various functions in growth and survival. And an elephant's trunk is like the multipurpose tool of "creature features" with hundreds of uses, including: showering, blasting water, grabbing, lifting, communicating, "hearing", pushing and pulling.

programme.title: T-Rex Ranch
programme.desc: In this awesome episode of T-Rex Ranch, Park ranger Darren accidentally gets hit with a sleepy dart!

programme.title: T-Rex Ranch

programme.title: Carl's Car Wash: Betty's Tomato Truck / Gus's Garbage Truck / Tony's Taxi Cab
programme.desc: When Betty's tomato truck hits a bump in the road, her truck becomes a tomato-y mess! So, she floors it to Carl's Car Wash where Carl goes through his three-point checklist and decides her tomato truck needs medium messy treatment. Betty pays five tokens and heads into the car wash. She leaves all tidied up! / Gus the Garbage Truck driver is doing a dumpster pickup when SPLAT, the trash lands all over his truck. What a stinky mess! Gus swings over to Carl's Car Wash, where Carl goes through his evaluation process and decides that Gus's truck a big garbage salad with a side of stink! So, Gus pays seven tokens and drives into the car wash. He rolls out sparkling clean. His truck never looked so good! / After Tony drops Ivan off, Fiona's Fire Truck zooms by and splashes mud all over Tony's Taxi! Tony needs to get cleaned up fast – time is money! After a quick vehicle evaluation, Tony counts 10 tokens and drops them into the machine deposit. He rolls into the car wash and gets his taxi all tidied up! Carl gives Tony a tip – to stay away from puddles. Tony drives away, one happy customer!

programme.title: Dino Ranch Shorts: Dino Ranchers Fly & more!
programme.desc: Nursery rhyme 'Dino Ranchers Fly', 'Dinosaur Dinosaur', Light Touch Tango', & 'Tangos Dancing Song' music videos from the hit TV show, Dino Ranch.

programme.title: Science Max: Earthquake-Proof
programme.desc: Phil tries to build a tower strong enough to not fall apart when shaken in a massive earthquake.

programme.title: Challenge Squad
programme.desc: Challenge Squad takes on the most epic challenges, featuring your favorite YouTube stars!

programme.title: EvanTubeHD
programme.desc: Share in the fun with YouTube star EvanTubeHD, his sister JillianTubeHD, and the whole Tube Family!

programme.title: HobbyKidsTV
programme.desc: Come along for the fun with popular YouTube family, HobbyKidsTV! Plus, HobbyKids Adventures!

programme.title: EvanTubeHD
programme.desc: Share in the fun with YouTube star EvanTubeHD, his sister JillianTubeHD, and the whole Tube Family!

programme.title: HobbyKidsTV
programme.desc: Come along for the fun with popular YouTube family, HobbyKidsTV! Plus, HobbyKids Adventures!

programme.title: Challenge Squad
programme.desc: Challenge Squad takes on the most epic challenges, featuring your favorite YouTube stars!

programme.title: HobbyKidsTV
programme.desc: Come along for the fun with popular YouTube family, HobbyKidsTV! Plus, HobbyKids Adventures!

programme.title: Mad Families
programme.desc: Focuses on three families – one Hispanic, one African American, one Caucasian – who find themselves sharing the same camping space on a Fourth of July holiday weekend. When none of them volunteer to vacate the site, they decide on a series of competitions to determine a winner.

programme.title: Dick
programme.desc: The year is 1972 and like most high-school students, Betsy Jobs (Kirsten Dunst) and Arlene Lorenzo (Michelle Williams) just want to have a good time. But when, during a class field trip to the White House, they cluelessly wander into a behind-closed-doors, top-secret shredding session, it's time toboth wag the dog, and walk it. Seeking to uncover just how much the witless duo discovered, the Commander-In-Chief, appoints them "Official White House Dog Walkers," and it isn't long before the girls go from taking out Checkers, to taking out Tricky Dick, in this fun-raising comedy of historic distortions.

programme.title: Holy Water
programme.desc: A rural Irish village will never be the same again after a group of bachelors hijack a truck full of Viagra pills as part of a get-rich-quick scheme. With special ops on their case, the boys hide the loot down the Church's Holy Well... only for it to seep out into the town's water supply.

programme.title: While We're Young
programme.desc: Josh (Ben Stiller) and Cornelia (Naomi Watts) are a happily married middle aged couple, who seem content with where their life is going. Josh is a film maker and Cornelia a producer. One day whilst teaching, Josh meets Jamie (Adam Driver) and Darby (Amanda Seyfried), a free-spirited young couple, who are spontaneous and untethered. Before long Josh and Cornelia, throw aside friends their own age to trail after the young hipsters and begin to feel a zest for life and a youth they wish they once had.

programme.title: Iceman
programme.desc: Ying (Donnie Yen, Ip Man, 14 Blades, Hero), a highly skilled martial arts warrior of the Ming Dynasty palace guard, is ordered to escort the precious Golden Wheel of Time, said to have the power of time travel and ability to see into the future, from Sindu back to China. Along his perilous journey he is wrongly accused of a murder and hunted by his three brothers, Yuanlong (Simon Yam, Lara Croft Tomb Raider) Sao, and Niehu, all bent on revenge. At the height of battle all four are buried by a huge avalanche, freezing them in time. 400 years later, they are unearthed, defrosted and forced to adjust to modern-day life. Using the Golden Wheel that unlocks the past, Ying must regain his honour and correct history, defeating his brothers once and for all in an almighty fight to the death.

programme.title: IP Man: The Awakening
programme.desc: The legendary Ip Man returns to the big screen to uncover the first action-packed chapter in the story of the man who would become a world-renowned martial arts master.

programme.title: Project Wolf Hunting
programme.desc: During an extradition to South Korea, a group of dangerous criminals unite to stage a coordinated escape attempt from their floating prison. As the jailbreak escalates into a bloody riot, the fugitives and their allies from the outside exact a brutal terror campaign against the special agents onboard the cargo ship. But the prisoners aren't the only ones waiting to rise from the darkness.

programme.title: The Dead Lands
programme.desc: After his tribe is slaughtered through an act of treachery, Hongi, a Maori chieftain's teenage son, must avenge his father's murder in order to bring peace and honour to the souls of his loved ones. Vastly outnumbered by a band of villains, Hongi's only hope is to pass through the feared and forbidden Dead Lands and forge an uneasy alliance with the mysterious Warrior, a ruthless fighter who has ruled the area for years.

programme.title: Cash
programme.desc: A stroke of good luck turns lethal for Sam Phelan and his wife Leslie when they are faced with a life-changing decision that brings strange and sinister Pyke Kubic to their doorstep.

programme.title: Outlawed
programme.desc: An action packed story of corruption and murder. Outnumbered, outgunned and against all odds, a Commando fights his way through a siege to save his girl.

programme.title: Checkmate
programme.desc: Six people are thrown together during an elaborate bank heist where any move can alter the outcome. Is it coincidence, or are they merely pawns in a much bigger game?

programme.title: Raptor Ranch
programme.desc: Fossil Ridge, once believed to be a cattle ranch is discovered to be a breeding ground for vicious prehistoric velociraptors. When the bloodthirsty dinosaurs escape, the townspeople must fight to survive the deadly raptors.

programme.title: Middle Of Nowhere
programme.desc: Ruby embarks on a journey of self-discovery when she drops out of medical school to focus on the welfare of her incarcerated husband.

programme.title: Seraphim Falls
programme.desc: The American Civil War has ended but Colonel Morsman Carver (Neeson) is on one final mission: to kill Gideon (Brosnan) no matter what it takes. Launched by a gunshot and propelled by rage, the relentless pursuit takes them both far from the comforts and codes of civilisation, into the bloodiest recesses of their own souls.

programme.title: The Complex
programme.desc: Nursing student Asuka has just moved into an apartment complex with her parents and younger brother. On the first night in her new room, she is awoken by a strange scratching sound coming from the apartment of her neighbor.

programme.title: Open Windows
programme.desc: Nick's a lucky guy. Tonight, he'll be having dinner with Jill Goddard, the hottest actress on earth. She's promoting her latest movie and he's won the main prize in an online contest. Then he gets a call. Some guy named Chord explains that dinner has been cancelled. And it's Jill's fault: she's a high- maintenance diva, and everybody hates her guts. Chord says he can make up for it.

programme.title: Uncle Nino
programme.desc: Overworked executive Robert Micelli has little time for his family that has become disconnected from one another. When Robert's long-lost Uncle Nino unexpectedly arrives on their doorstep from Italy for a visit, Nino's simple, old-fashioned ways help the Micelli's discover the joy of La Famiglia.

programme.title: Quest For Love
programme.desc: Mackenzie travels to Costa Rica for work. Her best friend Ethan comes along to get romantic inspiration for his action /adventure novel. Mackenzie has loved Ethan for a long time, but he only sees her as a friend--until a tourist named Lucas makes Ethan see Mackenzie in a new light.

programme.title: Letters To God
programme.desc: Tyler Doherty is an extraordinary eight-year-old boy. Surrounded by a loving family and community, and armed with the courage of his faith, he faces his daily battle against cancer with bravery and grace. To Tyler, God is a friend, a teacher and the ultimate pen pal-Tyler's prayers take the form of letters, which he composes and mails on a daily basis. The letters find their way into the hands of Brady McDaniels, a beleaguered postman standing at a crossroads in his life. At first, he is confused and conflicted over what to do with the letters. But the decision he ultimately makes becomes a testament to the quiet power of one boy's shining spirit and unshakable faith.

programme.title: From The Heart
programme.desc: Kathy Yoder has left her Amish ways and is a successful travel guide writer. When Kathy goes home to settle her dad's affairs, she's reminded of her life before she left the Amish community, including her old love, Isaac. Will Kathy decide to stay or return to her traveling lifestyle?

programme.title: Two Crosses at Danger Pass
programme.desc: Judy and Alex are the only two survivors of a punitive mission ordered by the rich and ruthless Moran.... The girl becomes his maid and the boy is adopted by a Quaker family. Alex, despite the philosophy of forgiveness he has been taught, plans to take revenge.

programme.title: Return of Shanghai Joe
programme.desc: A sinister town boss called Pat Barnes has exploited almost everyone in the town.

programme.title: Gunfight at Red Sands
programme.desc: An avenging outsider riddles a gang of ruthless bandits in revenge for the murder of his family.

programme.title: Bullwhip
programme.desc: In order to avoid the hangman's noose, a cowboy agrees to marry a beautiful but fiery redhead.

programme.title: Find a Place to Die
programme.desc: An outcast Confederate soldier redeems himself by defending a woman against bandits willing to kill for her goldmine claim.

programme.title: Love Under The Stars
programme.desc: When a 30-something woman living in an infinite state of youth is finally forced out into the real world, she befriends a young girl and a widower that will teach her that it is okay to grow up.

programme.title: My Boyfriends Dogs
programme.desc: Bailey struggles to find love as every man she dates turns out to be more of a dog than the ones she gets stuck with when they leave.

programme.title: 2 Years of Love
programme.desc: Samantha has a great marriage, until the pressure to have a baby comes up. Things get tricky when she starts falling for one of her clients, not realizing it is secretly her husband. Will they be able to make it through this rough patch?

programme.title: All She Wishes
programme.desc: When sardonic high school senior Sophie O'Dea inherits her neurotic grandmother's car, an old automobile named Star, she is told the car has magical powers.

programme.title: All Roads Lead to Rome
programme.desc: Uptight mother Maggie and her former Italian lover, Luca, go on a road trip across scenic Italy pursuing Maggie's rebellious teenage daughter who is trying desperately to return to New York.

programme.title: Anything
programme.desc: Anything is a heart-warming film about the power of love and acceptance. Grief-stricken over the recent death of his wife, Early Landry moves from Mississippi to Los Angeles in the hope of starting a new life. He quickly finds himself in an intense friendship with his transgender neighbour, Freda. However, the simplicity of their shared loneliness and growing affection must be reconciled with the complexity of their disparate backgrounds.

programme.title: Operation Overlord
programme.desc: A week before storming the beaches of Normandy, two US soldiers infiltrate an abandoned complex to rescue a prisoner of war from the Germans.

programme.title: All for Love
programme.desc: When an engaged romance novelist is teamed with a Navy man as research for her latest book, she is taken aback by his boisterous personality and egotistical nature. However, as her research brings them closer together, she discovers there's more to him than meets the eye. Will she choose the man she thought she loved or the real-life embodiment of her fictional hero?

programme.title: The Most Beautiful
programme.desc: During World War II, the management of a war industry of optical instruments for weapons requests an effort from the workers to increase the productivity during four months. The target for male workers is an increase of 100% of the production, but the female workers, led by the dedicated Tsuru Watanabe, ask the direction to surpass their goal from 50% to 70%. During the period, the women have to overcome illness and their personal problems to complete their quota.

programme.title: The Mother of the Lamb
programme.desc: Cristina (49) has spent her life taking care of her mother Carmen. Single and without a trade or friends, she grows older, year after year in her hometown. A few days from her birth- day, Cristina reconnects with Sandra, a former schoolmate who will show

programme.title: The Naked Kiss
programme.desc: Kelly, a prostitute, traumatised by an experience, referred to as 'The Naked Kiss,' by psychiatrists, leaves her past, and finds solace in the town of Grantville. She meets Griff, the police captain of the town, with whom she spends a romantic afternoon. Kelly finds a job as a nurse in a hospital for handicapped children. The work helps her find her sensitive side in the caring and helping of her young patients. Kelly's path towards happiness is thrown amiss, when she witnesses a shocking event, which threatens not just her happiness, but her mental health as well.

programme.title: The North Star
programme.desc: A Ukrainian village must suddenly contend with the Nazi invasion of June 1941.

programme.title: The Keeper
programme.desc: The Keeper tells the incredible true story of Bert Trautmann, a German soldier and POW who, against a backdrop of British post-war protest and prejudice, secures the position of goalkeeper at Manchester City, and in doing so becomes a footballing icon.

programme.title: Misconduct
programme.desc: An ambitious lawyer is caught between a corrupt pharmaceutical executive and his firm's senior partner. When the case turns deadly, he must find the truth or lose everything.

programme.title: The Experiment
programme.desc: 26 men are chosen to participate in the roles of guards and prisoners in a psychological study that ultimately spirals out of control.

programme.title: Rise Of The Krays
programme.desc: The early years of the two of the most notorious British criminals are portrayed in visceral brutality. London, 1961: Ronnie and Reggie Kray begin a reign of terror that would define London's East End for years to come.

programme.title: I Kill Giants
programme.desc: Barbara Thorson (Madison Wolfe) is a teenage girl who escapes the realities of school and a troubled family life by retreating into her magical world of fighting evil giants. With the help of her new friend Sophia (Sydney Wade) and her school counsellor (Zoe Saldana), Barbara learns to face her fears and battle the giants that threaten her world.

programme.title: Cosmic Sin
programme.desc: Bruce Willis and Frank Grilo star in a science fiction action drama as s even rogue soldiers launch a pre-emptive strike against a newly discovered alien civilization in the hopes of ending an interstellar war before it starts.

programme.title: Warning
programme.desc: Black Mirror meets Wild Tales in this visually-arresting, thought-provoking sci-fi thriller exploring the meaning of life through multiple interconnected lives. This highly original film stars Annabelle Wallis (Peaky Blinders, Annabelle), Thomas Jane (The Mist), Alex Pettyfer (Magic Mike), Patrick Schwarzenegger (Daniel isn't Real), Alice Eve (She's Out of My League) and Rupert Everett (The Happy Prince).

programme.title: Occupation Rainfall
programme.desc: From the VFX team behind The Last Jedi and Blade Runner 2049, Occupation Rainfall is a sci-fi action epic with an all star cast including Harry Potter's Jason Isaacs, The Mandalorian's Temuera Morrison and The Hangover's Ken Jeong. After an intergalactic invasion of Earth, where survivors are fighting back in a desperate ground war, the resistance uncover a plot that could see the war come to a decisive end for mankind. With the alien invaders hell-bent on making Earth their new home, the race is on to save the planet. Occupation Rainfall Is an explosive sci-fi extravaganza that grips from start to thrilling finish.

programme.title: Eternity
programme.desc: Detective Richard Manning (played by Elliot Travers) is transported into a virtual-reality computer game and tasked with solving a seemingly implausible murder. The more Richard investigates, the more complex the case seems to become. He soon realizes his own future and survival depend on him solving everything - and quickly.

programme.title: Mediator
programme.desc: A family counselor in the missing children's division becomes a mediator between the living and the missing.

programme.title: At Home With Tori
programme.desc: Tori hosts a “Bring it Back” themed luncheon for her neighbors in Hidden Hills with the help of Teddi Mellencamp.

programme.title: Pure Country 2: The Gift
programme.desc: Three angels bestow the gift of song to a young girl, who must follow a series of rules in order hold on to it during her rise to fame and fortune.

programme.title: Fatal Memories
programme.desc: Psychological thriller. A woman tries to help her sister remember the events surrounding the fatal stabbing of their mother.

programme.title: The Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Milo Boyd (Gerard Butler), a down-on-his-luck bounty hunter, gets his dream job when he is assigned to track down his bail-jumping ex-wife, reporter Nicole Hurly (Jennifer Aniston). He thinks all that's ahead is an easy payday, but when Nicole gives him the slip so she can chase a lead on a murder cover-up, Milo realizes that nothing ever goes simply with him and Nicole. The exes continually one-up each other – until they find themselves on the run for their lives. They thought their promise to love, honor and obey was tough – staying alive is going to be a whole lot tougher. Andy Tennant (Hitch, Sweet Home Alabama) directs.

programme.title: Top End Wedding
programme.desc: Top End Wedding is a feel-good road trip comedy from the producers of The Sapphires. Engaged and in love Lauren and Ned have just 10 days until their dream wedding in the remote far north of Australia. But there's only one issue... Lauren's mother has gone AWOL! The couple embarks on a fantastic road trip to find her. But will they find her in time and will their love resist the ultimate test?

programme.title: Sky
programme.desc: While on vacation in California, Romy breaks things off once and for all with her boorish husband in a dramatic final fight. A free woman in a strange land, Romy embarks on a life-changing trip through the desert that brings in her touch with strangers who impact her life in various ways: a kindly small town police officer, a pregnant, trailer park-dwelling mother, and a charming, ruggedly independent cowboy with whom she finds the possibility of new love.

programme.title: As I Am
programme.desc: One week of school remains for Kai, an aspiring writer, and his friends. How they spend this time will cost one of them their life and leave them changed forever.

programme.title: Destroyer
programme.desc: LAPD detective Erin Bell is placed undercover with a gang in the California desert with tragic results.

programme.title: Kill the Irishman
programme.desc: The true story of a tough Irish thug working for mobsters in Cleveland during the 1970s.

programme.title: A Prayer Before Dawn
programme.desc: An English boxer incarcerated in Thailand fights in Muay Thai tournaments to earn his freedom.

programme.title: Savage
programme.desc: Snowed in, no way out and cut off from the world atop a mountain, a lone police officer must hold out until his transfer arrives. One routine day soon turns into a fight for survival, in this stylish action-packed thriller as a group of armed thieves arrive at the door. Seeking shelter, theyre not taking no for an answer. Its kill or be killed and theres nowhere to run. A must watch!

programme.title: The Girl Who Invented Kissing
programme.desc: This hard-hitting drama follows a nameless, pill-popping drifter played by Suki Waterhouse (Love, Rosie). Upon meeting reclusive brothers Jimmy (Dash Mihok: Silver Linings Playbook) and Victor (Vincent Piazza: Jersey Boys) "The Girl Who Invented Kissing" soon upsets the balance of their lives, while bringing both trouble and new life into their world. Heart-wrenching and effortless - a must watch!

programme.title: Prey
programme.desc: Described as Donnie Darko meets Lost and from legendary production company Blumhouse. After the tragic death of his father, millennial Toby (Logan Miller: Escape Room) is begrudgingly enrolled in a program where he must spend time on a remote island. After meeting mysterious Madeleine (Kristine Froseth: The Society), Toby realises neither of them are safe and something bloodthirsty is lurking.

programme.title: The Siren
programme.desc: FrightFest Presents - a seductive, heart-wrenching story of passion and revenge of cursed star-crossed lovers, who will never let go. Tom rents a cabin on a secluded lake, marked by a local legend of a lovelorn spirit. He knows he has found his soulmate in the seemingly human Nina, who must repress her demonic instincts. Meanwhile, a man hunts the monster who killed his husband.

programme.title: Stranger In The House
programme.desc: A woman suspects her new stepmother of killing her father. Starring Emmanuelle Vaugier (2016)

programme.title: I Am Wrath
programme.desc: A former CIA operative seeks brutal vengeance upon the thugs who murdered his wife and the corrupt cops who are protecting them. Stars John Travolta, Christopher Meloni (2016)

programme.title: Cash
programme.desc: A couple stumble across a suitcase of money, however the owner sets out recover what is unlawfully his and takes them on a whirlwind ride just to survive. Starring Chris Hemsworth and Sean Bean (2010)

programme.title: A Call To Spy
programme.desc: To aid the war effort, Winston Churchill orders his new spy agency to recruit and train women for covert operations. Stars Stana Katic, Sarah Megan Thomas (2019)

programme.title: Bridal Wave
programme.desc: A woman planning for her wedding at a resort meets a charming local right before the ceremony. Starring Andrew W Walker (2015)

programme.title: The Convenient Groom
programme.desc: Dr. Kate is a romance guru with a hit radio show. But when she is unexpectedly dumped by her fiancé during their engagement party, will someone come to the rescue and protect her dignity? (2016)

programme.title: Blueprint to the Heart
programme.desc: TV presenter Tiffany reluctantly gives divorcee Brooks a lifestyle makeover for her new show. Can Brooks's charm help raise the show's ratings, or will he raise Tiffany's heart instead? (2020)

programme.title: A Picture Perfect Wedding
programme.desc: Young influential New Yorker, Josh, hires Lindsey to photograph his sister's wedding. Will the romantic setting cause sparks to fly between Josh and Lindsey? (2020)

programme.title: Bridal Wave
programme.desc: A woman planning for her wedding at a resort meets a charming local right before the ceremony. Starring Andrew W Walker (2015)

programme.title: The Internship
programme.desc: Billy (Vince Vaughn) and Nick (Owen Wilson) are salesmen whose careers have been torpedoed by the digital world. Trying to prove they are not obsolete, they defy the odds by talking their way into a coveted internship at Google, along with a battalion of brilliant college students. But gaining entrance to this utopia is only half the battle. Now they must compete with a group of the nation's most elite, tech-savvy geniuses to prove that necessity really is the mother of re-invention.

programme.title: Whiplash
programme.desc: Andrew Neyman is an ambitious young jazz drummer, single-minded in his pursuit to rise to the top of his elite east coast music conservatory. Terence Fletcher, an instructor known equally for his teaching talents and his terrifying methods, discovers Andrew and transfers him into his band. Andrew's passion to achieve perfection soon spirals into obsession, as his ruthless teacher continues to push him to the brink of both his ability and his sanity.

programme.title: A Perfect Plan
programme.desc: In Isabelle's family, every first marriage has ended in divorce. To circumvent the family's curse Isabelle devises a plan marry and divorce a complete stranger before wedding her faultless fiancé Pierré. After her initial plan backfires she targets Jean-Yves, an adventurous yet quirky travel writer who she tries to manipulate with powers of seduction. A series of misadventures beset them as they take on Africa and then Moscow on a whirlwind succession, breaking Isabelle out of her comfortable routine existence. Despite her efforts to make him fall for her things don't go to plan and Isabelle experiences the rush of life on the edge.

programme.title: Centigrade
programme.desc: Centigrade is a high-intensity, high concept survival thriller based on chilling true events. A married couple find themselves trapped in their frozen vehicle after a blizzard and struggle to survive amid plunging temperatures and unforeseen obstacles. At -40 degrees your lungs freeze and time is running out…

programme.title: Armored
programme.desc: A young armored car guard is persuaded by his veteran cohorts to empty the truck of its $10 Million.

programme.title: Tears Of The Sun
programme.desc: A Navy SEAL's assignment to rescue an American doctor marooned in wartorn Nigeria runs into unexpected complications.

programme.title: Once Upon a Time in Mexico
programme.desc: Returning from exile to avenge his slain family, the gun-slinging, guitar-toting "Desperado" dispenses justice the hard way.

programme.title: Mo Money
programme.desc: A young con artist tries to go straight by getting a job to be near a beautiful woman.

programme.title: Jack And Jill
programme.desc: Jack and Jill is a comedy focusing on Jack Sadelstein (Adam Sandler), a successful advertising executive in Los Angeles with a beautiful wife and kids, who dreads one event each year: the Thanksgiving visit of his identical twin sister Jill (also Adam Sandler). Jill's neediness and passive-aggressiveness is maddening to Jack, turning his normally tranquil life upside down. Katie Holmes plays Erin, Jack's wife.

programme.title: The Wedding Ringer
programme.desc: After a barbershop manager advises his best friend to break off his engagement, he unexpectedly falls in love with the jilted fiancee, testing both his new romance and his friendship.

programme.title: Death at a Funeral
programme.desc: Death at a Funeral is a hilarious day in the life of an American family come together to put a beloved husband and father to rest. As mourners gather at the family home, shocking revelations, festering resentments, ugly threats, blackmail and a misdirected corpse unleash lethal and riotous mayhem.

programme.title: 30 Minutes or Less
programme.desc: The tale of three slacker friends and the adventures that ensure after one of them inadvertently robs a bank armed only with a large salami.

programme.title: Astronaut (2019)
programme.desc: Angus is an elderly widower living out his retirement days in a typically dysfunctional modern family. When a billionaire businessman announces, live on television, a once-in-a-lifetime competition to grant three civilians a place on a commercial test flight into space, Angus sees his chance to live out what has been a lifelong dream. Lying about his age, Angus enters the competition, only to win one of the three golden tickets. But will he ultimately make it onto the flight and see his dreams realised or will reality bring him straight back down to earth?

programme.title: To Write Love on Her Arms
programme.desc: Based on a true story, this musical drama tells the story of how artistic fantasy, music and friendships helped teenager Renee embark on a courageous journey towards recovery.

programme.title: Brothers
programme.desc: Brothers tells the powerful story of two siblings, thirty-something Captain Sam Cahill and younger brother Tommy Cahill, who are polar opposites. A Marine about to embark on his fourth tour of duty, Sam is a steadfast family man married to his high school sweetheart, the aptly named Grace, with whom he has two young daughters. Tommy, his charismatic younger brother, is a drifter just out of jail who's always gotten by on wit and charm.

programme.title: The Last Act
programme.desc: Oscar® winning director, Barry Levinson directs Oscar® winning actor Al Pacino and Greta Gerwig in THE LAST ACT from the screenplay by Buck Henry and Michal Zebede based on the novel The Humbling by Philip Roth. Simon Axler is a famed stage actor who becomes depressed and then suicidal when he suddenly and inexplicably loses his gift. In an attempt to get his mojo back, he has an affair with a lesbian woman half his age. Before long, the relationship causes chaos as people from the romantic duo's pasts resurface in their lives.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles III: Turtles in Time
programme.desc: The turtles have defeated their nemesis Shredder and are still forced to hide in the depths of the subway system. April brings them gifts to cheer them up and one of them is a time traveling device which takes the turtles and April back to feudal Japan. The turtles must fight to free the village and find a way home. Starring Elias Koteas ("Gattaca," "Shooter"), Paige Turco ("The Game Plan," "Invincible"), and Vivian Wu ("The Pillow Book," "The Last Emperor")

programme.title: Resident Evil: The Final Chapter
programme.desc: Picking up after Resident Evil: Retribution, Alice (Milla Jovovich) is the only survivor of what was meant to be humanity's final stand against the Undead. Now, she must return to where the nightmare began – The Hive in Raccoon City, where the Umbrella Corporation is gathering its forces for a final strike against the only remaining survivors of the apocalypse.

programme.title: Mortal
programme.desc: Chronicle meets X-Men meets Thor Mortal is a fantasy adventure epic from the director of Troll Hunter and starring The Fault In Our Star's Nat Wolff. Based on ancient Norse Mythology, a young boy must discover the origins of his extraordinary powers before hell-bent authorities condemn him for an accidental murder. A breath-taking and thrilling origins adventure story about one boy's journey to uncover who, or what, he really is.

programme.title: Beyond the Law
programme.desc: A former mobster turned businessman and a police detective must contend with a dirty ex-cop looking to bring the killer of his son to justice.

programme.title: Music Videos That Shaped Me
programme.desc: Find out which music videos have shaped the lead singer from Years and Years.

programme.desc: Featuring a playlist of top picks from the UK, full of the biggest hits and underrated gems.

programme.title: Wicked Tuna: Outer Banks
programme.desc: The Northern fleet are not going down without a fight, but the Southern fleet battles on to keep the lead. Some boats are taking risks and changing tactics, because they know that all it will take is one good sized fish to shake up the leader board.

programme.title: Wicked Tuna: Outer Banks
programme.desc: Most of the crews of the fleet are getting desperate and are willing to try anything to catch the fish necessary to put them at the top of the leader board, but Reel E Bugging reckon they have it in the bag. One fish could make all the difference and a little bit of luck goes a long way.

programme.title: Wicked Tuna: Outer Banks
programme.desc: Being away from home for extended periods of time, the crews are all feeling a little homesick, but at the back of everyone's mind is that they are doing what they do, to support those loved ones, and they need to take advantage of every last bit of quota to make that happen.

programme.title: Wicked Tuna: Outer Banks
programme.desc: With yet another storm moving in, and the quota dwindling before their eyes, Captains are realising that the season could end before they achieve their objectives. The decision to stay out fishing or run from the storm always needs to be a balance between safety and reward.

programme.title: Wicked Tuna: Outer Banks
programme.desc: Mistakes and mechanical issues start to wear down the northern and southern fleets. Kahuna tries to catch up after boat repairs that keep Captain Reed Meredith and his crew off the water. Reel E Bugging Captain Bobby Earl navigates one setback after another in order to extend a hard earned lead. Meanwhile, Pinwheel hopes to catch quickly in order to push ahead of the leading southern boats before the quota closes.

programme.title: Wicked Tuna: Outer Banks
programme.desc: When one last extension is added to the quota, the competition gets tighter than ever. Its a game of leapfrog on the leader board, as every boat races to secure their last few paychecks before the season closes. With big bluefin being caught, everyone knows the limit will be full in the blink of an eye, but the real question is whose catch will be enough to take the top spot?

programme.title: Wicked Tuna: Outer Banks
programme.desc: JudgAll season long the bluefin battle between Northern and Southern boats has raged and the final two days of the season will be no different. A championship title is on the line, along with final paychecks and local reputations. Southern boats are in the lead, but Northerners, Pinwheel and Hot Tuna will not stop their pursuit of the title and desire to topple the Southern fleet. In the end it all comes down to one final giant bluefin tuna.e Frank Caprio takes an empathetic approach to a variety of traffic, parking and other violations.

programme.title: Wicked Tuna: Outer Banks
programme.desc: Opening day of winter bluefin tuna season in the Outer Banks. FV-Tuna.Com joins the Southern fleet for the first time. With the return of top-boats Fishin Frenzy, Reel E Bugging, Hot Tuna and Pinwheel everyone is fishing for success.

programme.title: Planet California: Close Encounters
programme.desc: From the majesty of blue whales and the menace of great white sharks to the curious habits of the kangaroo rat and playful kit foxes, rare and spectacular footage brings California's wildlife into sharp focus. Cataclysmic events like earthquakes and El Nino's storms rock and shape the land, yet some species - like Methuselah, one of the oldest organisms in the world - persist, constantly adapting to a rapidly changing world. Still, in a space shared with 40 million people, is there room for all? The pressure heats up in dramatic and challenging habitats. Move over Hollywood. Planet California's wildlife stars are ready for their close-up.

programme.title: Coasts
programme.desc: The crocodile is king of the wetland a tone of cold blooded monster with the most terrifying bite force on Earth. The product of a 100 million year ancestry, the 25 species around today are testament to the crocodile's supreme intelligence and adaptability.

programme.title: Lions On The Move

programme.title: Heroes Of The Wild Frontiers

programme.title: Heroes Of The Wild Frontiers
programme.desc: Elephant human conflict has been going on in India for decades. Only now it has increased because of the shrinking forests and the expanding human habitation. North Bengal with it's fragmented habitat of tea gardens, human habitation and paddy fields is a hot bed of conflict

programme.title: Wild Bavaria: Wild Bavaria
programme.sub-title: In The Shadow of the Watzmann.
programme.desc: Mighty and mysterious, King Watzmann sits above Germany's only alpine national park.

programme.title: North America's National Parks: America's National Parks
programme.desc: North America's National Parks are world famous and their breathtaking landscapes fascinate millions of visitors. This spectacular series will show you what happens beyond the lookouts. Everglades National Park is an American national park that protects the southern twenty percent of the original Everglades in Florida. The park is the largest tropical wilderness in the United States, and the largest wilderness of any kind east of the Mississippi River. An average of one million people visit the park each year. Everglades is the third-largest national park in the contiguous United States after Death Valley and Yellowstone. UNESCO declared the Everglades & Dry Tortugas Biosphere Reserve in 1976, and listed the park as a World Heritage Site in 1979, while the Ramsar Convention included the park on its list of Wetlands of International Importance in 1987. Everglades is one of only three locations in the world to appear on all three lists.

programme.title: Wilderness in Europe: The Bohemian Forest: Boundary Experiences in Mühlviertel
programme.desc: Pavel Hubeny, whose life would be unthinkable without the forest, is the head of the Šumava National Park. He is committed to ensuring that a primeval forest can grow for future generations, in which man does not interfere. This vision of a primeval forest is also shared by the forester Claus Bässler, who wants to counteract the extinction of species by having trees felled to create artificial deadwood and thus a new habitat for rare beetles and fungi. On the Vltava River lies the small town of Krumlov, the "Pearl of the Bohemian Forest" with its Baroque theater and fully preserved stage technology from the 17th century. Here the director Zuzana Vrbová enchants people from all over the world with her productions. Apart from agriculture, it was mainly the abundance of forests that ensured the livelihood of the inhabitants of the Bohemian Forest - including that of the carpenter Philipp von Manz, who processed local wood for his customers all over Germany. Veterinarian Judith Gollner, who grew up in the Austrian part of the Bohemian Forest, lived in Vienna for a long time and made a conscious decision to return. She likes the people and is proud of "her farmers' wives" who share her love of the Bohemian Forest.

programme.title: Myths of the Congo
programme.desc: The river that swallows all rivers - this is what the natives call it. In reality, the Congo, when considering its water masses, is the second largest and the deepest river in the world. At its source in the north of Zambia, it starts out as a mere trickle, but on its journey westwards it grows and grows, becoming ever mightier and with it, the animals, too: the shoebill stork hides in the dense papyrus. Metre-long pythons hunt for their prey in trees and huge hippos fight for power and respect in the water. To survive in the Congo, animals have to adapt to extreme conditions. Here, evolution has spawned unique creatures: fish with lungs, wings and those that go hunting on land. The Congo River feeds the second largest rainforest on earth. Here is the home of the forest elephant. Time and again, they are summoned to this one, magic place: the Dzanga Bay. Countless other forest dwellers join them. What makes this place so special?

programme.title: Myths of the Congo
programme.desc: The Congo, mighty and deep like no other river - yet still a retreat and a habitat for several of our world's strangest animals. Our closest relatives live deep inside the dense jungles: three of the four giant ape species have made the Congo basin their home. Rich in extraordinary footage, the second episode of "Myths of the Congo" also presents exciting insights into one of the most mysterious and dangerous regions on earth.

programme.title: A Year in the Wild
programme.desc: As predator competition heats up in the dry season, young and inexperienced prey get caught in the crossfire.

programme.title: Migrations
programme.desc: For marine migrators nothing can turn the tide these creatures perform some of the longest journeys on earth. There's no doubt that they belong to the toughest animals on the planet, facing endless hurdles and countless dangers.

programme.title: Islands
programme.desc: From log tapping gremlins to cumbersome giants, monster crabs and evenvampires, creatures of all shapes and sizes line up to show off their skills and begin their own island takeover!

programme.title: Nature's Calendar
programme.desc: June, a month of contrast the world over. It's a time of change across many of nature's habitats, shifting currents out at sea changes the nature of life for animals both on the waves and on land.

programme.title: The Last Mahout
programme.desc: This is the story of Sompast, his fight to carry on the legacy of his forefathers, and his quest to train new Mahouts to carry on this noble ancient tradition. A fight to keep the special relationship between elephant and man from disappearing.

programme.title: Living Nature
programme.desc: Each episode illustrates four different species at Bussolengo Nature Park, where experts carefully protect and maintain 260 different species of our most amazing animals.

programme.title: Shamwari
programme.desc: It's a tense meeting between Albert the sheep and his buddy Themba the elephant, as Themba doesn't recognize him with his new haircut. The fur is flying as the white lion cubs meet their new foster parents.

programme.title: Shamwari
programme.desc: There are tears of joy as two lions rescued from a circus in France take their first steps back on African soil. It's high-flying action as the game capture team brings in Africa's national emblem the springbok – these tiny antelopes can really jump.

programme.title: Shamwari
programme.desc: Keeping track of the world's biggest animal is harder than you think. Up at the animal hospital two feisty young caracals check in and we almost lose our very precious sheep Albert after he gets stuck down with a deadly tick disease.

programme.title: Shamwari
programme.desc: The wildlife team end up with a black rhino hot on their tail when the animal wakes up suddenly after being ear notched. It's the battle for the burrow up at the animal hospital as the orphaned warthogs take on a puppy for ownership of the hole.

programme.desc: Sausages - Jimmy and Jamie pitch British sausages against their German rivals, and Hollywood A-lister Gwyneth Paltrow comes to the caff to cook pasta with the boys and face a food fight of her own.

programme.title: Jamie At Home
programme.desc: Having sadly been neglected for more exotic imports, rhubarb is finally having resurgence.

programme.title: Jamie At Home
programme.desc: English asparagus is world renown and with a short six week season, something to really treasure.

programme.title: SCL 2021 Season 7, Episode 15, World Finals (Part 1)
programme.desc: We are in Alanya, on Turkeys south-coast for the final stop at the end of a mammoth season. Here in the sunshine, well finally crown our world champion and what a place Alanya is - you could not ask for a better setting. Aivars Smaukstellis, the reigning world champion is defending his title, and two-time world champion Dainis Zageris is also here, but with a though competition, who will win?

programme.title: SCL 2021 Season 7, Episode 16, World Finals (Part 2)
programme.desc: What a day ahead of us here in Alanya, just a handful of events to go before we find out who will be the winner of Strongman Champions League in 2021. These are the world finals, and all the big names are in the house. With just 3 events to go - who will take the crown of World Champion 2021 and be the STRONGEST?

programme.title: SCL 2022 Season 8, Episode 1, Finland Stage 1
programme.desc: We are back, after a short break it feels like we never even left. We're here in Vaasa - Finland kicking off 2022 new world series. If you are watching at home, just like these people, you're in the right place. Because this is a special edition world record breaker. The only question left today, is to see how many new world records will be set so stay tuned.

programme.title: SCL 2022 Season 8, Episode 2, Holland Part 1
programme.desc: We are here in Doetinchem – Holland, for Stage 2 and 3 in the hottest day of the year. 40-degree heat, these boys have to work harder than they ever have. The sun is going to be beating down, they're going to be sweating, hydration is going to be key today. I also reckon they're all going to be wearing their sunglasses. Let's see which shady looking character wins.

programme.title: SCL 2022 Season 8, Episode 3, Holland Part 2
programme.desc: So there you have it. The next day, 3 more events in 40 Degrees heat. We've got Gavin coming into day 2 leading the pack. Kelvin De Ruiter our world champion struggling a little bit at the moment, but Yoke Race, Conan's Wheel and then Stones to finish. There is a lot to be played for here, so stay tuned to see if Gavin can take the lead and beat Kelvin overall.

programme.title: SCL 2022 Season 8, Episode 4, Serbia Part 1
programme.desc: We're in the Serbian city of Novi kozarci, for the next stage in the world series. And what a fantastic line up we have for you again. But it is going to be one of the hottest stages yet. A Strongman competition in 44-degree heat. It will be a real challenge for these athletes to finish this event. From all over the world the strongmen came here for the title! Welcome to the heat hell in Serbia.

programme.title: SCL 2022 Season 8, Episode 5, Serbia Part 2
programme.desc: Welcome to day 2 in Serbia, and its another baking hot one. We are in Kikinda today! We've got three more gruelling events for our athletes. Sami Ahola is leading the pack, so can he be the first Finnish athlete to take an SCL title. Stay tuned to find out.
